siri_text: Tuesday's workout. Strength: Deadlift, 1 by 1 at 95 percent. Metcon: AMRAP 10 minutes: 300m Run, 10 Pull Ups, 10 Push Ups. For hypertrophy, focus on biceps, rear delts, core/anti-rotation.
